node.text: Deborah traveled to Bali last year, one of her favorite places, for peace and yoga.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Bali travel visit") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: A photo of the last hike with her friend Karlie brings a smile to Deborah's face whenever she sees it.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Bali travel visit") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Deborah was curious to hear more about Jolene's reflections from the meditation retreat and how they changed her.
Deborah finds peace and comfort in roses and dahlias in her garden after losing a friend last week.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Bali travel visit") on Session 6 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Deborah finds doing yoga on the beach with the ocean, sand, and fresh air peaceful and a perfect way to take care of herself.
Deborah felt nostalgia, longing, and grateful for memories when visiting a place that held memories.
Deborah went to a place that held a lot of memories for her.
Deborah recently sat by the sea with Anna, watching the sunset and talking about inspiring each other.
Deborah also sees the importance of appreciating small moments in life to boost happiness.
